study_title: Solenopsis invicta Raw sequence reads
exp_title: RNA-seq of Solenopsis invicta: Head from a single polygyne female alate
design: We extracted RNA and DNA from each sample using a dual DNA/RNA Tri Reagent based protocol. We applied the Krieger and Ross (2002) assay on the extracted DNA to identify only individuals with the SB/Sb genotype. Once RNA was extracted, cDNA libraries were prepared from total RNA using half volumes of the NEBNext Ultra II RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina. Raw RNA and the libraries were quality checked on an Agilent Tapestation 2200; library insert size averaged 350 bp.

study_title: Solenopsis invicta Raw sequence reads
exp_title: RNA-seq of Solenopsis invicta: Whole body from a single polygyne worker
design: We extracted RNA and DNA from each sample using a dual DNA/RNA Tri Reagent based protocol. We applied the Krieger and Ross (2002) assay on the extracted DNA to identify only individuals with the SB/Sb genotype. Once RNA was extracted, cDNA libraries were prepared from total RNA using half volumes of the NEBNext Ultra II RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina. Raw RNA and the libraries were quality checked on an Agilent Tapestation 2200; library insert size averaged 350 bp.

study_title: The fire ant social supergene is characterized by extensive gene and transposable element duplication
exp_title: RNA-seq  of Solenopsis invicta: SB/SB virgin queens, pair 2
design: Queen pupae were isolated in subcolonies, 18 days after eclosure the queens were dealated, and frozend after subsequent 7 days. All the virgin queens were observed laying eggs. Trizol fixed samples were use use to extract RNA using strandard Trizol Reagent protocol. RNA were then purified using Direct-zol RNA MiniPrep (Zymo Research). cDNA libraries were prepared for sequencing using standard Illumina protocols.
sample_title: RNA-seq of Solenopsis invicta: SB/SB virgin queens, pair 2
isolate: a pool of two virgin queen, genotype SB/SB, weight 9.2-9.8 mg, colony Qing 24
